text: As I stand before this glass enclosure, observing the bright, modern space and the inviting colors of the exhibition ahead, I feel a blend of curiosity and quiet anticipation. The world feels structured yet open to innovation here, as if I'm on the threshold of exploring new realms of thought. The tools for safety and information—fire hose, signs, illuminated exits—highlight the care taken in this environment, which reassures me. I feel ready to step forward and engage with the ideas presented inside.
